# Subbly

> Subbly is an AI video caption editor. Upload a video, auto-generate word-perfect captions, edit text and styling, then export an MP4 with subtitles burned in.

Subbly transcribes speech automatically, lets you style captions with animated templates (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts and more), fine-tune timing on a timeline, and burn captions directly into your video — all in the browser.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Subbly's AI captioning, styling templates, and export workflow.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free and paid plans, transcription hours, storage, render quality, and FAQs.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in to save projects.
